notes: Default gravity deck for the Lovers / apartment. Mixes small intimate beats (reed crosses the room, the record changes side) with pressure beats (the friend knocks awkwardly, the landlord rings the buzzer). Endgame cards at the bottom of the pile.

deck.title: reed crosses the room
deck.flavor: reed has moved to a new corner. you didn't see them get up.

deck.title: the record changes side
deck.flavor: the record skips to the b-side. you both pause for the moment.

deck.title: a box opens
deck.flavor: the tape on a box gave up. the contents are visible.

deck.title: the radiator clicks louder
deck.flavor: the radiator is doing the thing it does at three pm.

deck.title: the window breeze
deck.flavor: january air through the cracked window. cold and clean.

deck.title: reed holds a thing
deck.flavor: reed is holding something and not putting it in a box.

deck.title: the diner's call bell
deck.flavor: the bell downstairs. john is busy.

deck.title: the painting glances at you
deck.flavor: the unfinished painting on the easel is doing something.

deck.title: an awkward silence
deck.flavor: neither of you is speaking. the silence has shape.

deck.title: the kettle finds itself
deck.flavor: the kettle clicks. somebody put it on.

deck.title: reed steps on a creaky board
the phone in the diner rings
deck.flavor: you can hear it through the floor.

deck.title: reed speaks
deck.flavor: they say a thing they have not said before.

deck.title: the painting is done
deck.flavor: the painting on the easel is finished. you don't remember finishing it.

deck.title: the afternoon holds
deck.flavor: the room is steady. you both notice it at the same moment.
